title: SourceOSModelCarryRef
description: Approved SourceOS on-device reference to a governed model or model-service profile that may be carried by a ReleaseSet or BootReleaseSet without embedding mutable model state.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

modelRef.description: Governed model, adapter, or service reference approved by model-governance-ledger and consumable by model-router.

governanceRef.description: Reference to the model governance ledger release decision or factsheet record authorizing this carry reference.

routerProfileRef.description: Model-router profile URN that describes route constraints for this carried reference.

releaseSetRefs.description: Optional ReleaseSet or BootReleaseSet URNs allowed to carry this reference.

launchProfileRefs.description: Optional SourceOS launch profile URNs for local service startup.

fallbackRefs.description: Fallback model carry references used when this route is unavailable or disallowed.

carryPolicy.description: How SourceOS may carry or prepare the referenced model/service without embedding mutable model state.

cachePolicy.description: Highest cache behavior allowed for this reference under local policy.

mutableModelState.description: Whether the OS image carries mutable model weights or adapters. Must remain false.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence URNs or content hashes supporting approval, cache policy, and release binding.
